    Handles course registration requests and approval workflow.

    ResearchService
    Provides research-related application services such as paper management, project creation, journal subscription, and research analytics.
    StudentProfileService
    Handles student-specific profile actions such as researcher mode, supervisor assignment, diploma project setup, ratings, and course teacher lookup.
